title: The One With Joey's Big Break

lines.text: Central Perk, everyone but Phoebe are there reading. Rachel is sitting on the couch flanked by Ross and Monica. She suddenly stops reading and starts blinking her left eye as if it's bothering her. The problem is that Joey is on her left and thinks she's winking at him and winks back. Ross is watching this and isn't quite sure of what to make of it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What's going on?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, my eye is a little itchy.
Ross turns to look at Joey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uhhh, mine too! Yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (To Rachel) Wow! It's really red! You should go see my eye doctor.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Richard? I'm not gonna go see your ex-boyfriend!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, Richard. That's all I ever hear, Richard, Richard, Richard!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Since we've been going out, I think I've mentioned his name twice!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, so Richard, Richard!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's not Richard! Okay? It's this new guy and he's really good.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I'm sorry I'm not going to an eye doctor!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh God, here we go!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Anytime anything comes close to touching her eye or anyone else's she like freaks out. Watch! Watch! (He takes his finger and moves it towards his eye.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (flinches) Ross! Come on! That's all right! Fine--Okay, I have a weird thing about my eye. Can we not talk about it please?

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: All right, fine.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Rach, remember that great song, Me, Myself, and I? (And on the "I" part she mimics poking her eye.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (flinches again) Monica! Come on!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, does anybody want to get some lunch? All those in favor say I? (Pokes his eye)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (freaks) Ross! Stop it! Come on!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: How much did I love The King and I? (Oh, you get the point by now.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Chandler!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Me too! Me too! Me too! (Yeah, he does the same thing.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Just stop it! Come on!
Joey howls in pain and holds his eye.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You okay there man?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, I got too excited!
Opening Credits
Monica and Rachel's, Ross, Chandler, Monica, and Phoebe are eating breakfast.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, I gotta go. I'm taking Ben to the park.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh, give him a kiss for me!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right, bye!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Later! (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (after he's gone) I am so sorry you got caught in the middle of that. I didn't mean to be so out there. I am furious with him!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wow umm, calm down.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm trying, but man that guy can push my buttons!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why are so mad at him?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Look, I don't wanna talk about it. Okay?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, it just seems that...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You wanna be on my list too? Keep talking! Has anyone seem my list by the way?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh, no Pheebs. What's it look like?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh, it's a piece of paper and it says, "Ross" on it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering, depressed) Hey. I just got off the phone with Estelle and guess what. (Pause, then very excitedly) I GOT THE LEAD IN A MOVIE!!!!!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You got the lead in a movie? That's amazing! What's the movie about?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's called Shutter Speed, it's really cool! Yeah, umm, I meet this girl in the subway and we fall in love in like a day, right? And then, she disappears... But I find out where she lives and when I get there this like old lady answers the door and I say, "Where's Betsy?" Right? And she says, "Betsy's been dead for 10 years."

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh-oh, chilling!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: And the best part is, we're filming in the desert outside Vegas! (To Chandler) And you know what that means buddy!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I know that means buddy!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Road trip! Yeah, we can rent a car! I just have to be there by Tuesday!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh wait, my grandmother's dead.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, uh, we can talk about that too Pheebs.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! No, her cab! She probably won't be using it; you can drive it to Las Vegas.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right! Thanks Pheebs!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Whoa-whoa-whoa, what are we going to do about my job?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh umm, not go.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, great, road trip baby! (To Monica) This okay with you?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler! You don't have to ask for my permission. (Quietly) You can go.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Rach, come on! We're gonna be late for the eye doctor appointment!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering from her bedroom) All right! Let's get this over with! Ugh! (She walks by the table and notices that no one is looking and accidentally on purpose knocks over the open cereal box.) Ohhh! No! Look what I did! (She starts walking through the mess. {Also, notice the continuity error in this scene. Note the position of the box and dispersal pattern of the cereal before and after the camera cut.}) Oh, I mean, look at this mess! I mean, we're probably gonna have to clean this up! Y'know? We're gonna have to reschedule!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No. If you thought this mess is going to bother me, you are wrong! All right, let's go Blinky! (She ushers Rachel out the door, but before the door fully closes she sticks her head back in.) Chandler!!!! (Chandler agrees to clean up the mess.)
Central Perk, Joey is reading a map as Phoebe enters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh hey Joey! What's up?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I can't decide which route to take to Vegas. Hey, you've traveled a lot right?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I've been around.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, so-so which route should I take the northern route or the southern route?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, if you take the northern route there's a man in Illinois with a beard of bees. {Okay, I must protest this, I've lived in Illinois all my life and know of no man with a beard of bees! Wisconsin, on the other hand, might be a different story.}

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Great! Problem solved!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: But on the southern route there's a chicken that plays tic-tac-toe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, back to square one.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I know a way that you can decide! All right, I'm going to ask you a series of questions and you answer as quickly as you can.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (quickly) Yes!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Good, but wait. Okay, all right, here we go. Now I want you to relax. Take a deep breath. Clear your mind. (Quickly) Which do you like better peanut butter or egg whites?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Peanut butter!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Which would you rather be a fireman or a swimmer?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: A swimmer!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Who would you rather sleep with Monica or Rachel?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Monica. Oh... huh, I always thought it would be Rachel.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No thinking! No thinking! Tie or ascot?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ascot!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: North route or south route?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: North route!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Bamn! There you go! Huh?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! That was incredible! Beard of bees, here I come!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, this guy again. (She ignores him.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey man, what's up?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uhh, not much. You guys want to see a movie tonight?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure, what do you want to see?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I don't know, umm...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I know how we can decide. Phoebe, show him your game!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Umm, no thank you. (She gets up and moves to the couch. They were at a table previously.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What's with her?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know. But hey, I know we can decide. Okay, I'm gonna ask you questions and you answer real quick. Okay?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What do you like better action or comedy?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Action.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Who would you rather sleep with Monica or Rachel?
Ross pauses and looks at him, Joey motions for him to hurry up.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Dude, you are sick.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry. I forgot you had that whole Rachel thing.

Monica's eye doctor's office, Monica and Rachel are waiting in an exam room and looking at this big white thing used to check eyes. I have no idea what it is, and if an ophthalmologist happens to know what that is, let me know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! What does that thing do?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (looks at it more closely) Oh that's an eye removal machine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, I'm outta here!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm kidding! I'm kidding!
Rachel heads for the door but is intercepted by the doctor.

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: Hi Rachel!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: The Doctor
lines.text: I'm Dr. Miller. Monica told me you were a little nervous, but don't worry everything's gonna be just fine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So were done then!

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: Almost! But first, we gotta start.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: This is a glaucoma test.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: Sit down.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: But your chin here. (She does so.) Now, you'll feel a small puff of air in each eye.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (jerks back from the tester) What?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: A small puff of air, now come on!

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: Here we go.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: 1...2...3! (Rachel jerks back on 3.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm sorry. All right, I'll just stay in here this time. (Puts her head back.) Okay.

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: Ready?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: 1...2... (She flinches on 2 this time.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'know what, I'm gonna hold her head.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: That's okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay. (Monica backs off.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Okay!

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: 1...2! (She flinches again.) (Gives up.) Y'know what? You're young; you probably don't have glaucoma.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (really excited) Great!! It was very, very nice to meet you sir--Ow! Hey! What are you doing?! Are you crazy! (He took out that thing they use to look at people's retinas and looked at Rachel's when she was shaking his hand causing her to flinch and scream at him.)

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: Okay. You've got a small, minor infection in that left eye. I want you to take these drops three times a day and you'll be as good as new.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, no, I don't-I don't put things in my eye.

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: Okay then, I guess we'll see you back here in three months.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: And I'll fit you for a glass eye.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, just give me the damn drops! (Grabs them and storms out.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Dr. Miller? (She covers her right eye and reads from the chart) P E C F D.

lines.speaker: Dr. Miller
lines.text: Very good Monica! You know where they are.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I sure do! (She runs over to a drawer, opens it, and grabs a lollipop.) (To Rachel) And you don't get one!
Central Perk, Phoebe, Rachel, Monica, and Joey are there.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Y'know, I-I gotta tell ya, those eye drops are a miracle. My eye is a 100% better.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: They're still in my coat.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Damn!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! You ready to go?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, listen, how cold is it going to be there? Do I need a coat or will all these sweater vests be enough? (Holds up 3 of them in different colors.)
Monica stares at him.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I love you.

{There's another continuity error here. Before Monica says I love you, Chandler's holding the vests so that you couldn't see the collar, you could see all three, and they were folding nicely. After she says the line and the camera cuts back to Chandler, you can only see two out of the three, you can see the collar of the top one, and it looks like it was folded sloppily, unlike before. Hey, you notice things while spending this much time on this!}

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Man, I wish Ross was coming with us! Y'know? I'm gonna miss him!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thanks a lot! I just got that jerk out of my mind!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, so where are we staying? Is the movie putting us up in a big hotel suite?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh no, not really. It's an independent film y'know? So we don't have a real big budget. I figured I'd just stay in your room.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I see, but once you get your first paycheck you'll be springing a big hotel suite, right? I mean, lead in a movie, they must be paying you a lot?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh yeah! For every dollar Shutter Speed makes, one penny of it goes right in Joey's pocket.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you don't get paid unless the movie makes money?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Did you not hear the plot of the movie? "She's been dead for ten years." I'm gonna be a millionaire!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I just wanna say good-bye to you guys and to see if you guys will place a little bet for me, huh? Twenty bucks on black 15.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You got it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right!
Joey nods to Chandler, no way!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, bye-bye now!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Bye!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Bye you guys!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Bye-bye!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I wanna say good-bye at the car!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Anybody want to say good-bye to me at the car?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh honey, I'll say good-bye to you at the car if you don't mind the puss.
Pause.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: See ya! (Walks out.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, wait a minute! The puss is good! It means it's healing! (Runs after him.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Pheebs, what 'cha reading? (Phoebe ignores him) Pheebs? (Turns away) Hello? (He sits down next to her and she moves over a bit.) Phoebe? (He moves closer and she keeps moving away.) Phoe-Phoebe! (They end up hanging over the arm rest.) Come on! (He grabs the magazine away from her.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry. I didn't see you there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Phoebe, are you, are you mad at me, or something? 'Cause if are please, tell me what it is I did!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, if you don't know I can't help you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I don't know.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I can't help you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, whatever it is I'm-I'm very, very sorry. Okay?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Apology accepted.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. So we're, we're good?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: All right. (Gets up.) I'll uh, I'll see you later, okay?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (quietly) Bye, fat ass.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ALL RIGHT!! Phoebe now come on! Will you please tell me what it is I did that mad you so mad at me!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't know! I don't remember!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well if you can't remember, can't we just forget about this?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh no, I am mad at you. I know that much. But, I am sorry about the fat ass thing. You actually have a very sweet little hiney.
Ross isn't sure what to do with that comment.
Phoebe's cab, Joey and Chandler are headed across the George Washington bridge on their way to Las Vegas. Joey is driving.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Man, I'm getting pretty tired. You're might have to take over soon.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We've been driving for a half-hour, and you haven't looked at the road once.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Don't worry, it's out there! (Just then a horn honks and Joey quickly looks at the road.) I think I just need lunch.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You wanna eat? (Pulls out the twenty) My treat!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Isn't that Ross's money?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. Okay. Ross's treat! Where do you wanna eat?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ooh, hey, I know how we can decide! All right, uh, I'm gonna ask you a bunch of questions and then you have to answer real fast. Okay? So uh, clear your mind Clear it right out! Clear it out! Clear!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, uhh, would you rather be too wet or too dry?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Too dry.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Do you believe in ghosts, yes or no?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Is this movie gonna be my big break?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (shocked) What?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Dude you said, "No!"

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I also said, "Yes!"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You don't think this is going to be a big break for me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! (Realizes) Ahhh!!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't believe this!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Look Joe, I just, I just don't want to get your hopes up real high.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What are you talking about?! I'm the lead in a movie!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: They're not even paying ya! This doesn't even sound like a real movie!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Y'know what? I don't need this! Okay? I don't know why you're dumping all over my big break.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joe, I don't think this is going to be your big break.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Is that why you're on this trip, huh? Make me feel like a loser? 'Cause if it is, I'll tell ya, I-I-I'd rather be alone.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, you don't want me on the trip?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Not if you're gonna be like this!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, I'll tell ya what, the next time you ask me a question like that I'll lie.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! I don't want you on the trip!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right, fine! Fine! Why don't you pull over? I'll get out right now!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Fine! (He slams on the brakes, stopping the car on the bridge to the sound of numerous car horns.) Get out!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You're not actually supposed to stop on the bridge.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Get out!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right!! (Gets out and Joey speeds away.) Wait! Wait, there's no sidewalk! Yeah, I'm gonna die here.
Commercial Break
Central Perk, Ross, Phoebe, Rachel, and Monica are there. Ross is trying to figure out why Phoebe's mad at him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, are you mad at me because my hair gel smells?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Are you angry at me because I said your handwriting is childlike?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No that made me feel precious.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, I know! Umm, is it because he's always correcting people's grammar? Whom! Whom! Sometimes it's who!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah? Sometimes it's... (Does the fist thing.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, did you beat him at a board game? He turns into such a baby when he starts to lose.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I'm the baby. (Points at his eye.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Eh! Stop it!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler! What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joey kicked me out of the car on the George Washington bridge!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Why?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know! He went crazy! Y'know, we were playing that game where you-you ask a question and you answer it really fast.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That game should not be played without my supervision.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I don't know what mad him so mad, y'know? All I said was that uh, I didn't think this wasn't gonna be his big break, that this movie wasn't going to do anything for him, and that uh, y'know it didn't sound like a real movie--Okay, he should've pushed me off of the bridge.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What's in the bag?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, I figured you guys would all be mad at me. So I got you some gifts that I found on the side of the road. (Looks into the bag.) Who wants the teddy bear with one leg?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I do!
Monica and Rachel's, Rachel is trying to apply her eye drops while Monica looks on.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. (She tilts her head back and squeezes the eyedropper. The only problem is, it's not over her eye.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Not even close.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, then y'know what? Help me! I need help! I can't do this!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay! All right! Let's do it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sit down. (They sit down on the couch.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Put your head back.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Now, open your eyes.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, they are. (No they're not.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How many fingers am I holding up? (She's not holding any up.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (thinks) Four.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, I was thinking four.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Really?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes! All right, y'know what? Why don't we start with a practice run? Okay?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No drops!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Great!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: On three, 1...2...3! (Rachel turns her head on three to avoid the drops.) Now my pillow's all wet! (She was trying to fool Rachel and squeezed the eyedropper.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, well, you said it was practice!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Then why did you move?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Because I knew you were lying!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, come here! (She gets up and drags Rachel off of the couch by her legs.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (as she's being dragged) What are you? Monica!! Stop it!! Oh my God! Stop it! (Monica drags her totally onto the floor and on her back.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I am going... I'm going--Turn it over! (Rachel rolled onto her stomach and Monica rolls her back.) I'm... I am going to get these drops in your eyes. (She is holding Rachel down with both hands and has the eyedropper in her mouth.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! You really are freakishly strong!
Monica starts biting on the eyedropper, spraying the fluid all over. But Rachel keeps turning her head back and forth and Monica keeps missing.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica! Stop it!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (spitting out the eyedropper) Damn! It's empty!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow, y'know if Joey and Chandler walked in right now, we could make a fortune! (Monica is straddling Rachel and holding her arms down. In a rather risque pose, at least for primetime TV.)
Monica and Rachel's, time lapse, Phoebe and Monica are playing cards as the phone rings.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh that is definitely Chandler, Joey, or Ross. (Thinks) Or-or Rachel!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (answers the phone) Hello? (Listens.) (To Phoebe) It's Joey. (Phoebe's proud of herself.) (To Joey) I'm so glad you called! Chandler told me what happened. Y'know he's really upset about it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (on a pay phone holding a box) Not as upset as he's gonna be when he finds out what I did with his sweater vests!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What did you do to his sweater vests?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Let's just say there's a well-dressed pack of dogs in Ohio. Hey Monica listen is-is Phoebe there? I gotta ask her something about the car.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, she's here. Hold on a second. (She hands the phone to Phoebe.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, dude!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Pheebs! Listen, this wooden box keeps sliding out from under the seat. What-what is it?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh that's my grandma. (Joey holds the box away from him.) And thanks Joey she's having a really great time. (Joey is happy now.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (who has just entered) Is that Joey? Is that Joey? Let me talk to him! I wanna talk to him!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay Joey? Chandler's here, he was wondering... (We hear the dial tone as Joey hangs up.) Okay, I guess he ran out of change.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Y'know, he won't even talk to me. How am I going to apologize to him if he won't even talk to me?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, maybe you should send him something. So that when he gets to Las Vegas he'll know that you're sorry.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's a good idea. I wonder where I could (Pause) get a basket of porn...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, don't-don't say I'm sorry with porn!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y'know what you should send him? A cartoon of cigarettes. 'Cause that why he could trade it for protection. No. That's prison.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Okay Pheebs, I know how we're going to figure this out. Okay, clear your mind and answer the first thing that comes into your head. Okay?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-hmm.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What do you like better flora or fauna?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Fauna.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Who would you rather be Simon or Garfunkle?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Garfunkle.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why are you mad at me?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You said I was boring--Ohh!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: When did I say you were boring?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God, I remember now! We were playing chess!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Phoebe! You and I have never played chess!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, come on! Yes, remember that time on the frozen lake? We were playing chess, you said I was boring, and then you took off your energy mask and you were Cameron Diaz! (Realizes) Okay, there's a chance this may have been a dream.

The desert outside of Las Vegas, Joey is arriving and we hear the song, Name. Y'know, (singing) I've been through the desert on a horse with no name! It felt good to be out of the rain. In the desert, you can't remember your name, 'cause there ain't no one for to give you no pain. La...la...la-la-la, la, la, la, la-la-la. You get the idea. Anyhoo, he pulls up and stops. As he gets out of the car, he spills a huge pill of fast food containers out of the foot well.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey-hey! Stanley! Hey-hey! You're leading man is here! Let's get to work.

lines.speaker: Stanley
lines.text: Umm, slight change of plans. We've shut down.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wh-what?! Why?!

lines.speaker: Stanley
lines.text: It's a money thing, we don't have any.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (laughs) You're kidding right?

lines.speaker: Stanley
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Stanley
lines.text: It-it's probably just temporary. We're hoping to get some more money soon, so if could just uh, hang out.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, hang out?! How long?

lines.speaker: Stanley
lines.text: I don't know. A week? Maybe two? The money will turn up! People will always wanna invest in movies! Hey, you're not rich are ya?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Stanley
lines.text: Eh, worth a shot. (Gets into his car.) Look Joey, let me know where you're staying, okay? (The car peels away.)
I think one of the grips walk up to Joey, mainly because there's a credit for The Grip. What the heck is a grip anyway?!

lines.speaker: The Grip
lines.text: Hey pal, are you Joey Tribbiani?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: The Grip
lines.text: These got left for ya. (He hands him a bunch of helium balloons.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks. (The grip walks away.) (Reading the card.) Congratulations on your big break.

The rest of the crew start to drive away leaving Joey sad, alone, and holding his congratulatory balloons as the song comes up again. La-la-la. See, I've been through the desert on a horse with no name! It felt good to be out of the rain! In the desert you can't remember your name, 'cause there ain't no one for to give you no pain. La-la-la, la, la, la...
Monica and Rachel's, the phone is ringing.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (answering it) Hello?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (on phone from Vegas) Hey Monica, it's Joey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Joey! Aww, you remembered even though you're a big star!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Aw, come on! It'll be years before I forget you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey, what's it like on a movie set, huh? Do you have a dressing room? Do you have a chair with your name on it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, well yeah-yeah, I've got all of that going on. Yeah, listen uh, I want you to make sure you tell Chandler that he couldn't have been more wrong! Uh-oh! I gotta go Monica, my uh, my sushi's here!
[Cut to Joey hanging up the phone in Vegas. He's wearing a Roman gladiator's uniform and goes over to join a family to pose for a picture. You see, he's apparently taken a job at Caesar's Palace.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to the family) Sorry about that. Thanks for waitin'.

lines.speaker: The Husband
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Everybody smile! (The picture is taken) Okay, thanks a lot! Enjoy your stay at Caesar's! We hope it's toga-rrific! (The family leaves.) Kill me. Kill me now.
Ending Credits
Monica and Rachel's, The gang is surrounding Rachel at key positions.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Rach, can you pass me the TV Guide?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yep!
As she moves to get it, Monica yells...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Go!!

Phoebe jumps to the floor as Ross tackles Rachel off of the couch. Chandler helps push Rachel onto the floor by jumping over the back of the couch. Phoebe grabs Rachel's head to hold it still and opens Rachel's eye as Monica jumps onto Chandler's back to administer the torture--I mean medicine.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!! Stop it! Stop it! Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay! Okay! Okay! (She succeeds in getting the eye drops in and everyone climbs off of Rachel.) We'll see you in about 3 to 4 hours.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh! (She's trying to recover while still on the floor.)
End
